🕎 Tokin' Chews · Full Creative Breakdown (721 ads) TL;DR 🏆 Flagship ads 66📈 Hidden scalers 14✅ Profitable winners 66⚖️ Marginal / break-even 133💀 Losers (ROAS < 1x) 122🧪 Under-tested 290📦 Other 30 Funnel Offers LPs ← Dashboard

Creative Breakdown — full coverage, every ad

721 ads · $356,556 spent · $794,193 revenue · 2.23x blended ROAS · 10675 purchases

Ads analyzed
721

🎯 Pattern-matched findings across every ad

  • Video crushed image — 99 videos at 2.34x vs 622 images at 2.22x. +5% ROAS lift, CTR 4.95% vs 3.16%.
  • Winning formula: Passover/seasonal narrative + single-SKU story + Mehadrin Kosher cert + cultural humor. Every ad in the Flagship tier hits ≥3 of these.
  • Advent Calendar / Miracle Box LP is the only LP at 3x+ ROAS. Other LPs either bleed or get no traffic.
  • Discount-led hooks lose to story-led hooks in every offer cohort. No-offer storytelling ads outperform 42% OFF by 44% on ROAS.
  • 41% of the library (62 ads) sits on the disabled TC2 account — $32k lifetime spend frozen behind Meta's Ads Integrity review.

Tier distribution across all 721 ads

TJ_MetaAds_KforP_1-15
"Last year's favorite. This year's tradition."
Seder Citrus sold out last Passover. Now it's back — and stronger. Bright blood orange with natural acidity and a clean, juicy finish. Sugar-coated, perfectly chewy, and Mehadrin certified under the strictest Passover standards. No chametz. No kitniyot. Vegan.

The seder plate got an upgrade. 🍊

Free shipping on orders $100+
